tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsAddVersion
tools.description: Creates a new SecretVersion containing secret data and attaches it to an existing Secret.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Secret containing no SecretVersions.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a secret. Returns empty policy if the secret exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsPatch
tools.description: Updates metadata of an existing Secret.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified secret. Replaces any existing policy. Permissions on SecretVersions are enforced according to the policy set on the associated Secret.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has for the specified secret. If the secret does not exist, this call returns an empty set of permissions, not a NOT_FOUND error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsVersionsAccess
tools.description: Accesses a SecretVersion. This call returns the secret data. `projects/*/secrets/*/versions/latest` is an alias to the most recently created SecretVersion.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsVersionsDestroy
tools.description: Destroys a SecretVersion. Sets the state of the SecretVersion to DESTROYED and irrevocably destroys the secret data.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsVersionsDisable
tools.description: Disables a SecretVersion. Sets the state of the SecretVersion to DISABLED.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsVersionsEnable
tools.description: Enables a SecretVersion. Sets the state of the SecretVersion to ENABLED.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsVersionsGet
tools.description: Gets metadata for a SecretVersion. `projects/*/secrets/*/versions/latest` is an alias to the most recently created SecretVersion.

tools.name: projects.secretmanagerProjectsSecretsVersionsList
tools.description: Lists SecretVersions. This call does not return secret data.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
